nl_query: Which faculty members have prepared answer keys for papers where they are also assigned as the board coordinator, creating a potential conflict of interest?
failed_sql: SELECT fc.name AS evaluator_name, fc.employee_erp_id, akp.faculty_cache_id AS preparer_employee_id FROM faculty_cache fc JOIN answer_key_preparer akp ON akp.faculty_cache_id = fc.id JOIN board_coordinator bc ON bc.faculty_cache_id = fc.id JOIN answer_key ak ON ak.qp_id = bc.qp_id WHERE akp.faculty_cache_id = bc.faculty_cache_id AND bc.board_id = 10 AND fc.is_active = TRUE
error: Validation failed (schema): Column validation failed: board table has id, NOT board_id.
